commit.subject: LU-6554 mgc: release cl_mgc_mutex on error
commit.message:
LU-6554 mgc: release cl_mgc_mutex on error

In mgc_fs_setup() release the cl_mgc_mutex on the appropriate error
paths.

Signed-off-by: John L. Hammond <john.hammond@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ib00a2400c9b24967645083762ff7182ea9a62f56
